_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section.
_comment_script: kind:script 'command' must contain exactly ONE scripts/* path token.

AC-001-a.command: . .\scripts\setup-env.ps1 *>&1 | Out-Null; cd src-tauri; cargo test -p toaster --lib export_format_mov_variant

steps: Run pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 to start the monitored app.
Open eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4 in Toaster and let transcription complete.
From the editor, Export Edited Media; save as toaster_example-edited.mov.
In PowerShell: ffprobe -v error -show_format toaster_example-edited.mov and confirm exit code 0.
Confirm the output's [FORMAT] section contains format_name=mov,mp4,m4a,3gp,3g2,mj2 and a non-zero duration.
Repeat with Advanced Settings > Export set to 'Video (mp4)'; confirm the same ffprobe exit 0 and format_name contains mp4.
Confirm both files play in the system video player without errors.

AC-001-c.verifier: Advanced Settings > Export dropdown live check
steps: Click the Format dropdown and confirm it lists exactly: Video (mp4), Video (mov), Audio - mp3, Audio - wav, Audio - m4a, Audio - opus — in that order.
Select 'Video (mov)', close settings, reopen, and confirm 'Video (mov)' is still the selected value (settings persistence).

AC-002-b.command: . .\scripts\setup-env.ps1 *>&1 | Out-Null; cd src-tauri; cargo test -p toaster --lib export_format_mov_settings_roundtrip

AC-003-a.command: . .\scripts\setup-env.ps1 *>&1 | Out-Null; cd src-tauri; cargo test -p toaster --test export_format_mov_codec_parity
